## Goal
Describe the discoverability or citation issue.

## Expected impact
- [ ] Better machine-readable context (LLM discovery)
- [ ] Better technical citation clarity
- [ ] Better contribution discoverability

## Proposed change
Explain the exact file(s) and update(s) you recommend.

## Validation
How should we verify this change improves discoverability?
